title: sagina maritima subsp. rodriguezii
intro: Sagina maritima subsp. rodriguezii is a subspecies of the coastal pearlwort plant, a type of flowering plant in the carnation family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections, making it a valuable remedy for skin issues and other health conditions. The herbal preparations of Sagina maritima subsp. rodriguezii include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
